arts.ttl: Merino's Arsenal impact, Iwobi's passing prowess, West Ham's survivor
arts.sum: As he pushes for a first start, Arsenal's opponents, starting with Bournemouth, live on Sky Sports on Saturday, must prepare for the prospect of the most dangerous set-piece team in Europe adding one of the continent's most effective players in the air. Last season, in addition to winning more duels than any other player in Europe's major leagues, Merino ranked fourth for successful aerials.

arts.sum: Guglielmo Vicario, who football.london reported in September was added to Tottenham's leadership group in the summer by Postecoglou, is also another key voice in the changing room for Spurs. Tottenham and Sweden are both benefitting from a key period in the attacker's life and it may even result with Ange Postecoglou getting a new leader on the pitch in Kulusevski.

arts.ttl: Lopetegui on Tottenham, dealing with their intensity and looking for momentum
arts.sum: They have very good players, but they all work as a team. They have big, big intensity, very good players and very good ideas so we have to be ready to have the right answer.
